steps.title: Use the descriptive details
steps.content: The novel has an enormous cast, a complicated wandering plot, and page numbers that count backward. These features all point to something intricate and difficult to fully capture in a brief review.

steps.title: Name the shared quality
steps.content: Choice A concerns factual correctness, which the sentence does not discuss. Choice B contradicts the active plot and large cast. Choice D suggests moderation, the opposite of the sprawling description. The word for intricacy and many-layered structure fits. The answer is C.
